---
title: "Experimental Economics"
description: "Lab and field experiments, oTree, classical replications, meta-analysis of behavioral findings."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="experimental-economics"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Experimental Economics</h1>
  <p class="lead">Lab and field experiments, oTree, classical replications, meta-analysis of behavioral findings.</p>
</div>
```
